title: Anchor Hocking Graduated Measuring Glass, Set of 2, Clear
description:
About this item
Anchor Hocking 91016l12 5 Oz Glass Measuring Glass
reviews_5s: The one had forever dropped on a tile floor and was shattered... and I could not manage without it - for quick melting of butter and easy measuring of liquids! So happy when they arrived - and now I have a spare should another accident leave me without one!These are the best drink measuring glasses ever. One problem: I break them with great regularity. I should probably buy a case and drink less.I like the variety of measurements in ounces and ml. It's perfect for anything that requires smaller measurements than those found on a standard measuring cup. I like to use it for measuring out ingredients for cocktails. :) There is only one note of caution. Do not put them in your dishwasher to clean. The measuring lines and other print on the glass tends to fade quickly. Hand wash only. Takes five seconds.Anchor hockey well name brand can see the lettering very well heavy quality measure cupGlass is good and measure marks don't come off.I didn’t quite understand some of the negative reviews. I almost didn’t order the item because of it, but I’m glad I did!I needed measuring cups in the small sizes. These are perfect for me.Finally, something worth the money.does what it's supposed to do. I bought several of them.Once I discovered the ease of using this measuring glass, I will never be without one. So simple but so practical. I broke my original one and since the replacement came with two glasses, I shared one with a friend who had never tried it. She is hooked.
reviews_1s: I bought a set of these a while back and one was broken upon receipt and the second broke in the dishwasher. I thought it was a fluke so I ordered another set. One is warped and the second broke within 2 weeks. Cheap, thin glass. Do not waste your money,Was supposed to receive a set of 2. Only 1 in the box & it was broken. Shop elsewhere.Both cups were broken.These are terrible. They only hold a very small amount, which is sometimes useful. However you cannot pour from them. Runs down the side of the glass. No good!We bought some of these a few years ago, and I wanted to buy a few more. Unfortunately, the quality of these was awful. Not only was the actual glass thin, which means they will break easily, the glasses were misshapen, and not even round.Not great quality. The cups arrived with many of the number and unit labels missing or worn off.received it and one of the measuring cups was broken.I read a few reviews that complained about the inaccuracy of the measurement line but risked getting them anyway. I used to buy these at wally world but they no longer carry them. I used a measuring cup I know to be accurate and one of these anchor cups was off by 10 ml and the other was off by 5 ml. That's too far off for me, I need to be accurate within 1-2 ml and these failed. The bottoms have varying thickness and apparently there is no quality checking. Already returned mine. Can't make a recommendation for another product but if you need to be accurate in your measuring, trust me, find something elseThis is not an actual Anchor Hocking product. At least the ones I received were not. I bought 2 of these and I’m writing this review after one of them just broke into about 1000 pieces on my wood floor. I suspected these were not Anchor Hocking when I received them bc there is usually an anchor an branding on the bottom that is embossed. These had a generic sticker. Not to mention the red measurement markings are cut off on one glass and it looks like the sticker didn’t set right. Also, I’ve dropped my AH glasses and bowls before and unless it’s on concrete or ceramic tile, they are usually very durable and don’t break. These are cheap, thin glass. I would not recommend or buy again. (First and second picture are of this product, last picture is of my real anchor hocking for comparison )Not round
